title: Where is this from
wikitext:
[]: Where is this from?             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jan 04, 2009 2:42 pm Hello. Um.... Sorry if this thread some of you may find annoying but where is this picture from. Was in EoE because I don't remember seeing it in EoE...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 04, 2009 2:46 pm Yes it was EoE. This scene: http://evacommentary.org/episode-m26/episode-m26-scene11.html EVA-01 comes IN. The helmet is gone; hair is waving about. (Her color is back to purple.) Yui's Voice "If she alone can go on living, by herself… It will be very lonely, but as long as she exists…" Fuyutsuki's Voice ""She will be the eternal proof that people existed."

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jan 04, 2009 7:05 pm Thanks. I don't know how I missed it. It answers some questions.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jan 04, 2009 10:46 pm Isn't there like an epic major thread about this? Was it this one? http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2180
